query:
SELECT 'products' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM products WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'station_tasks', COUNT(*) FROM station_tasks WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'station_events', COUNT(*) FROM station_events WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sampling_results', COUNT(*) FROM sampling_results WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'productivity_score_details', COUNT(*) FROM productivity_score_details WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'engineer_daily_productivity_affected', COUNT(*) FROM engineer_daily_productivity WHERE (userId, businessDate) IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT se.operatorUserId, se.businessDate
  FROM station_events se
  JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
  WHERE p.poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01' AND se.operatorUserId IS NOT NULL
);
